title: pelecyphora chihuahuensis subsp. chihuahuensis
intro: Pelecyphora chihuahuensis subsp. chihuahuensis is a cactus species native to Mexico, belonging to the genus Pelecyphora and characterized by its unique, spherical stems covered in sharp spines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pelecyphora chihuahuensis subsp. chihuahuensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's stems can be dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
